title: Cryptantha talquina
taxonomy: Cryptantha talquina is classified as a species within the genus Cryptantha, which is a part of the plant family Boraginaceae. The genus Cryptantha belongs to the order Borales. The family Boraginaceae is within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Angiosperms are a subset of the more general group of plants known as plants. uses: Cryptantha talquina, also known as the "Talquina", is a plant species native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is primarily used in traditional medicine in Peru.
